session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report all output. This is a CI validation step.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target for CI validation

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1646 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [104 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2 due to **Prettier formatting issues** in 2 files. Here's the summary:
**FAILED: Prettier formatting check**
Two files need formatting: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
Run `prettier --write` to fix these files.
**PASSED checks:** - Lint (ruff): All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5647 passed in 21.77s - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.05s - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.78s - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed - Markdown checks: OK - Exec reference check: OK
The CI validation is blocked only by the Prettier formatting issues in those two markdown files.
